toy.notes: Internal smoke-test fixture. Always vendored; safe to run anywhere.

longmemeval.notes: Fetched via bench/scripts/fetch-longmemeval.ts. MIT licence: safe to vendor with attribution. The vendored slice is a stratified sample (seed=4711) across the three axes most relevant to epic #1042.

locomo.notes: CC-BY-NC-4.0 (non-commercial). NOT vendored by default — see corpus/README.md for the legal-check checklist before enabling. The harness skips this dataset gracefully when the file is absent.
